description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a matte black finish, featuring a metal receiver and polymer lower assembly. The rifle has a prominent folding stock at the rear, designed for portability and ease of storage, and a curved detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is relatively short and capped with a small flash hider, while the top of the receiver is fitted with classic iron sights. The grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling, and the fire selector switch is visible above the trigger. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, optimized for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact black submachine gun with a folding stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the folding stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, muzzle device, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fire selector, magazine, and the structure of the folding stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the folding stock and the rear sight alignment.
